name: Liefwork

releases.author: Phoelectrix
releases.description: Build-verification follow-ups — no feature changes. The root build now leaves main.js at the repository root where verification looks; the builtin-modules package is replaced by Node's own builtinModules (byte-identical output). Converts to Apache-2.0 on 24 July 2030 per LICENSE §12 (see CHANGELOG).
releases.name: Liefwork for Obsidian 0.1.4

releases.author: Phoelectrix
releases.description: fundingUrl now points at the Lemon Squeezy storefront — a stable, directly reachable page one click from supporting the project. No other changes. Converts to Apache-2.0 on 24 July 2030 per LICENSE §12 (see CHANGELOG).
releases.name: Liefwork for Obsidian 0.1.3

releases.author: Phoelectrix
releases.description:
Directory health follow-ups — no feature changes.

- fundingUrl points at the stable product page (the checkout's per-session redirect read as unreachable to automated checks).
- Root `build` script so build verification can reproduce main.js from this tree (byte-identical).

Converts to Apache-2.0 on 24 July 2030 per LICENSE §12 (see CHANGELOG).
releases.name: Liefwork for Obsidian 0.1.2

releases.author: Phoelectrix
releases.description:
Directory-review hardening — no feature changes.

- Visibility toggles moved from inline styles to stylesheet classes.
- Timers and requestAnimationFrame bound to their own window (pop-out correctness).
- Lockfiles ship with the release tree so builds verify end-to-end.
- Typed-lint clean across the shipping surface.
- Adds CONTRIBUTING.md.

Converts to Apache-2.0 on 24 July 2030 per LICENSE §12 (see CHANGELOG).
releases.name: Liefwork for Obsidian 0.1.1

releases.author: Phoelectrix
releases.description: First public release. See the README for what the plugin does — and does not do — to your vault.
releases.name: Liefwork for Obsidian 0.1.0
